notes: Awaiting hand-keyed values from the named public source. AIP publishes weekly Terminal Gate Price data as XLSX at aip.com.au/sites/default/files/download-files/<yyyy-mm>/AIP_TGP_Data_<dd-Mon-yyyy>.xlsx (filename is date-stamped each week) plus an annual roll-up AIP_Annual_TGP_Data.xlsx. Parsing XLSX is out of scope for the current fetcher runtime (stdlib + requests + pyyaml only). When populated: copy the week's national metropolitan TGP table rows, keep manual_entry true, set retrieved_at to the data-entry timestamp, and set status to ok.
